kits.title: DeFi Dashboard
kits.description: A complete DeFi portfolio tracker showing token balances, USD values, DEX trade history, and P&L across any EVM chain.

kits.title: NFT Portfolio Viewer
kits.description: Browse and value any wallet's NFT collection with floor prices, traits, sale history, and multi-chain support.

kits.title: AI Wallet Agent
kits.description: An autonomous AI agent that monitors wallets, detects anomalies, verifies counterparties, and reports onchain activity.

kits.title: Token Analytics
kits.description: Deep token research tool with holder distribution, price history, whale alerts, and risk scoring.

kits.title: Multichain Explorer
kits.description: Track any address across all chains — transactions, balances, NFTs, and activity heatmap in a single view.

kits.title: Solana Builder Kit
kits.description: Everything you need to build Solana apps — wallet balances, SPL tokens, NFTs, DEX trades, and staking data.
